title: REFEREE_DISCOVERY_RESULT
description: Response to a REFEREE_DISCOVERY_REQUEST, returned by the receiving discovery endpoint (a Keeper node, a Norm-managed registry, or any other discovery-capable endpoint). Carries the REFEREE_PROFILE objects matching the request's filters, as published by their Referees — the discovery endpoint does not certify their content. Reputation is verified independently via REFEREE_STATS_QUERY to each Referee's Keeper.

profiles.description: REFEREE_PROFILE objects matching the request's filters. Empty if none matched. Contains at most `limit` entries (default 10) from the corresponding REFEREE_DISCOVERY_REQUEST.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when this result was issued.
